title: マヤノトップガン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting from today, Mayano Top Gun will begin
preparing for the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I organize a scrimmage to test her skills.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's time for takeoff! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay! ☆ I'm number one!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... How did that... happen?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So you were being serious... when you said.. you
had a new strategy...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I thought it'd be interesting to be the front
runner this time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But y'know... ☆ I think I just came up with a really
fun way to run!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heehee. ♪ Like this!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Boom!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Are you sure you're not cheating? You have way too much energy...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(This is Nice Nature. She's quite close to Mayano
Top Gun, so she's one of the racers who agreed
to run in the scrimmage.)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think that our twinkly, nerdy racer
knows a bit too much?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even now it looks like she's coming up with a
whole new strategy...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...If there's some kind of trick to it, do you think
you could spill it to me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that Mayano Top Gun tends to pick up
on things very fast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's her innate senses at work. Rather than a
trick, it's more—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey! Trainer! Why aren't you looking at me?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Haha, my apologies. I was just borrowing
your trainer for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What?! You can't do that! Trainer is mine!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's it, no more running for the day! I refuse to
do anything other than go on a date!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't "huh" me! This is all your fault!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We'll rendezvous in ten minutes at the school
gates! Do you copy?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go get ready! See you in a bit. ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh my... It seems she's quite smitten with you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll be taking my leave now. You youngsters don't
need someone like me in the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Mayano Top Gun and I are going on a
date now...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What are you gonna get, Trainer? I'm gonna get a
super boiling hot one with honey whipped cream.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Drinks! C'mon, you can't walk down this street
without a coffee in one hand!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once we get to the next block, I'll let you have a
sip of mine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Come on! Try to look good for the camera, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Three, two, one!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you've gotta move. I'm taking a video,
not a photo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My date with Mayano Top Gun continues...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Why are you walking so slow? Pick up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: All right, we're here! Our last spot for today.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's a racecourse, duh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The last stop on our date has to be the place
where I twinkle the most!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, it looks like the next race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the leaders round the fourth corner. Uh-oh,
it looks like the racer in last place—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that cornering just now? I know
what's gonna happen next!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I knew it! She's gonna fake a pass and then
stay on the ins—wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I didn't know you could maneuver like
that!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! That was amazing! Races really are the
best way to get your heart pumping!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Look at them. I wanna race on a real track as soon as I can.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna run and twinkle like those racers just now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, you're right! My debut!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha! ☆ You'll help me accomplish everything I
want to do, won't you? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I'm gonna race in the Twinkle Series! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmm-hm-hmmm... I'm so excited. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so, Mayano Top Gun and I begin our
journey to take on the Twinkle Series.
